source_note: Live closing prices from Yahoo Finance NSE feeds. 1D / 1W / 1M deltas computed from the daily candles (5 / 21 trading-day lookback).

Tata Motors.note: Renamed from TATAMOTORS to TMPV after the Oct 2025 demerger (passenger vehicles + JLR + EV).

Tata Motors CV.note: Tata Motors Commercial Vehicles — listed Nov 2025 as a separate entity post-demerger.
